sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, str1 VARCHAR, str2 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'duck', 'duckdb');
SELECT jaro_winkler_similarity(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET str2 = 'duck' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT jaro_winkler_similarity(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
